strengths: 17 years of continuous engineering experience across web, embedded, mobile, and high-throughput infrastructure (millions of req/s at Sociomantic)
Founder of GISCollective since 2016 — demonstrates entrepreneurial execution, open-source platform deployed on Kubernetes at real-world scale
Recent hands-on AI tooling work at re:cinq including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks, showing current-direction awareness
concerns: AI expertise is confined to a single role starting April 2025; no shipped AI products or platforms at scale exist anywhere in the 17-year record
Career titles have plateaued at Staff/Senior IC with no documented transition to principal, distinguished, or director-equivalent scope or strategic advisory responsibility
No graduate-level AI credentials (Master's/PhD); education is a BS in CS plus a fine-arts degree, with no specialization in ML or AI
response.justification: The role requires a director-level IC who can advise strategic customers on AI adoption and demonstrate recognized AI expertise through shipped products or platforms. Szabo clears the 15-year minimum experience bar and the GISCollective founding partially satisfies the entrepreneurial criterion, but every other differentiating requirement is unmet: his only AI work is a three-month-old MCP tooling engagement with no scale evidence, his titles have never advanced beyond Staff/Senior with no documented strategic advisory or cross-org influence scope, and he holds no AI-related graduate credentials. The gap between the role's expectations and the candidate's demonstrated seniority and AI depth is too large to bridge at interview.
